creator: mph@pobox.com
text:
On Tue, May 12, 1998 at 11:25:38PM -0500, Carey Jones wrote:

> I don't plan on fiddling with the Luigi drivers, so feel free to make
> whatever changes may be necessary to the port.

It doesn't build on a stock 2.2.6 machine, which is pretty essential.
Perhaps somebody who knows more about sound code could look into it?

(And if Carey isn't in a position to support stock -STABLE, perhaps
take over as maintainer?  Not trying to step on toes, but building
on a stock machine is pretty essential IMHO.)

-- 
Matthew Hunt <mph@pobox.com> * Stay close to the Vorlon.
